sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114758" key="xrotih/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χροτιή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, late poet. form for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρώς,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.35</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theoph.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
